title: AlphaFold 负责人 John Jumper 离职 Google DeepMind，加入 Anthropic
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Demis Hassabis
@demishassabis
Thanks John for an extraordinary partnership and wonderful collaboration over the past 9 years! What we achieved with AlphaFold changed the world, and showed the field what was possible with AI for science and medicine, lighting the way for how AI can benefit humanity.
John Jumper
@JohnJumperSci
13h
A bit of news: After nearly 9 years, I have decided to leave Google DeepMind and join Anthropic (after taking some time to recharge). I am incredibly grateful for my time at GDM. @ demishassabis took a real chance letting me lead the AlphaFold team just six months after finishing Show more
4:07 PM · Jun 19, 2026 497.1K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: AlphaFold 负责人 John Jumper 离职 Google DeepMind，加入 Anthropic
discovery_record.discovery_summary: AlphaFold 团队负责人 John Jumper 宣布，在 Google DeepMind 工作近 9 年后决定离职，将加入 Anthropic（先休整一段时间）。DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis 表示，过去 9 年与 Jumper 的非凡合作改变了世界，AlphaFold 展示了 AI 在科学与医学领域的巨大潜力，并为 AI 造福人类指明了方向。Jumper 回忆，Hassabis 在他博士毕业仅 6 个月后就大胆让他领导 AlphaFold 团队，感谢团队教会他如何做伟大的科学。

key_excerpts.text: AlphaFold 团队负责人 John Jumper 宣布，在 Google DeepMind 工作近 9 年后决定离职，将加入 Anthropic（先休整一段时间）。DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis 表示，过去 9 年与 Jumper 的非凡合作改变了世界，AlphaFold 展示了 AI 在科学与医学领域的巨大潜力，并为 AI 造福人类指明了方向。Jumper 回忆，Hassabis 在他博士毕业仅 6 个月后就大胆让他领导 AlphaFold 团队，感谢团队教会他如何做伟大的科学。
Post Log in Sign up Post Demis Hassabis @demishassabis Thanks John for an extraordinary partnership and wonderful collaboration over the past 9 years!
What we achieved with AlphaFold changed the world, and showed the field what was possible with AI for science and medicine, lighting the way for how AI can benefit humanity.
John Jumper @JohnJumperSci 13h A bit of news: After nearly 9 years, I have decided to leave Google DeepMind and join Anthropic (after taking some time to recharge).
I am incredibly grateful for my time at GDM.
@ demishassabis took a real chance letting me lead the AlphaFold team just six months after finishing Show more 4:07 PM · Jun 19, 2026 497.
